name: L. paracasei JS-3 C. elegans and elderly-gut-microbiota fermentation study
summary: C. elegans aging and stress-resistance assays paired with in vitro fermentation experiments using gut microbiota from elderly individuals to assess Lactobacillus paracasei JS-3.
model_system: C. elegans lifespan and stress assays plus in vitro fermentation of gut microbiota from elderly donors
